title: Daily Transaction Summary Report & Artifact
description: Implement a new 'daily-transaction-summary' artifact type for the MoneyWorks AI assistant that displays transaction summaries by type with Gross, GST, Nett, and Count columns. Follows the established artifact pattern: TypeScript types in types.ts, React component, artifact-renderer.tsx integration, mw-report tool enhancement, and system prompt documentation.
why: Enable instant daily financial pulse-check through the AI interface, reducing friction for real-time business insight without switching to MoneyWorks directly.

tasks.title: Add DailyTransactionSummaryData interface and types to types.ts
tasks.description: Add 'daily-transaction-summary' to ArtifactType union. Create DailyTransactionSummaryData interface with summaryByType array and totals. Create isDailyTransactionSummaryData type guard. Add DailyTransactionSummaryData to ArtifactData union.

tasks.title: Create DailyTransactionSummary React component
tasks.description: Create new component file daily-transaction-summary.tsx. Display transaction summary table with Type, Gross, GST, Nett, Count columns. Include totals row and transaction type legend.

tasks.title: Integrate component into ArtifactRenderer
tasks.description: Import isDailyTransactionSummaryData from types.ts. Import DailyTransactionSummary component. Add new case 'daily-transaction-summary' in switch statement with type guard check.

tasks.title: Add daily_transaction_summary report definition to mw-report.ts
tasks.description: Add 'daily_transaction_summary' entry to REPORT_DEFINITIONS object. Update mwReportToolDef.description to include new report type.

tasks.title: Implement daily_transaction_summary report generation logic
tasks.description: In runMwReport function, add handler for 'daily_transaction_summary' report. Query Transaction table for transactions on specified date. Group by Type and calculate Gross, GST, Nett sums and count. Return structured data matching DailyTransactionSummaryData interface.

tasks.title: Update system prompt with daily-transaction-summary artifact documentation
tasks.description: In buildSystemPrompt() function in anthropic.server.ts, add documentation for 'daily-transaction-summary' artifact type. Include example JSON structure. Add usage guidance in 'When to Generate Artifacts' section.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript compilation verification
tasks.description: Execute 'bun run typecheck' from packages/ai directory. Verify no new TypeScript errors related to DTXN-001 changes.

tasks.title: Integration test: AI artifact generation
tasks.description: Dev server started on port 5175. Manual testing required: Submit 'Show me a daily transaction summary' to AI assistant and verify artifact renders.

acceptanceCriteria.description: DailyTransactionSummaryData interface defines summaryByType array with TransactionTypeSummary items (type, typeName, gross, gst, nett, count) and totals object
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Lines 265-308 in types.ts define TransactionTypeSummary and DailyTransactionSummaryData interfaces

acceptanceCriteria.description: isDailyTransactionSummaryData type guard function correctly identifies DailyTransactionSummaryData from ArtifactData union
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Lines 387-389 in types.ts: checks for summaryByType, fromDate, and toDate properties

acceptanceCriteria.description: DailyTransactionSummary React component renders transaction summary table matching the MoneyWorks sample report format
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: daily-transaction-summary.tsx created with table showing Type, Gross, GST, Nett, Count columns, totals row, and legend

acceptanceCriteria.description: ArtifactRenderer.tsx includes case for 'daily-transaction-summary' type with proper type guard check
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Lines 97-100 in artifact-renderer.tsx: case 'daily-transaction-summary' with isDailyTransactionSummaryData check

acceptanceCriteria.description: mw_report tool includes 'daily_transaction_summary' report type in REPORT_DEFINITIONS
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Lines 107-114 in mw-report.ts: daily_transaction_summary definition added

acceptanceCriteria.description: Report generation queries Transaction table for the specified date and aggregates by transaction type
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Lines 430-528 in mw-report.ts: queries Transaction table with TransDate filter, groups by Type, calculates Gross/GST/Nett/Count

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation passes with zero new errors related to DTXN-001 changes
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun run typecheck shows no errors in types.ts, daily-transaction-summary.tsx, artifact-renderer.tsx, mw-report.ts, or anthropic.server.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: AI can generate and display daily transaction summary artifact via natural language request
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: System prompt updated with daily-transaction-summary artifact documentation (lines 163-174 in anthropic.server.ts). Dev server running on port 5175.

decisions.description: Simplified data model to match MoneyWorks Daily Transaction Summary format (Type, Gross, GST, Nett, Count) rather than full P&L sections
decisions.rationale: Aligns with the actual MoneyWorks sample report format provided and keeps implementation focused

decisions.description: Removed balance change indicators from initial implementation
decisions.rationale: The sample report format shows transaction type summaries, not balance changes. Balance changes can be added in a future iteration if needed

learnings.description: TypeScript spread operator with conditional && returns boolean false when condition is falsy, causing TS2698 error. Use ternary operator instead: (condition ? {...} : {})
